DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, JUL-07-2021 HEARING HELD RE: PLAINTIFFS DEAN LAGOE AND CINDY LAGOE'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS AT DEPOSITION. NONE OF THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO JULY 26, 2021 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, LAW & MOTION. JUDGE PRO TEM TO PREPARE A REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION. JUDGE PRO TEM: PETER CATALANOTTI; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: JUSTUS BALENTINE, CSR NO. 13859, EMAIL: JUSTUSBALENTINECSR@GMAIL.COM, TEL: 714-471-2597 (302/JPT)
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-26-2021 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUL-26-2021 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS DEAN LAGOE AND CINDY LAGOE'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS AT DEPOSITION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE REPORT AND RECOMMENDATION OF THE JUDGE PRO TEM IS ADOPTED IN ITS ENTIRETY. PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS AT DEPOSITION IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Answers At Deposition
Off Calendar Jul-26-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS DEAN LAGOE AND CINDY LAGOE's Motion To Compel Answers At Deposition.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The report and recommendation of the judge pro tem is adopted in its entirety. Plaintiffs' motion to compel answers at deposition is denied.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)

Atty. RONALD L. CARELLO, Esq. of Cassinat Law Corporation (Tel: 916-393-3030) for plaintiffs Dean LaGoe and Cindy LaGoe;
Atty. JESSICA R. MACGREGOR, Esq. of Long & Levit LLP (Tel: 415-397-2222) for defendants Walkup, Melodia, Kelly & Schoenberger and Matthew Davis;
